criteria.description: Prompt includes the file-path headers from the concatenated selected markdown verbatim.
Output parsing extracts citations correctly from a fixture citation-containing LLM response.
Citations in the answer reference actual file paths provided in the input set (positive case).
Building block exists for detecting a cited path NOT among the provided set (without 4.5.2's own rejection test).
Malformed LLM output (unparseable JSON, missing field, wrong type) raises SynthesizerParseError with a descriptive message.
Markdown code-fence wrapping the JSON response is tolerated.
LLMError from llm_client.complete() propagates unwrapped (not converted to SynthesizerParseError).
